textByHash.9987b075edd21f3528e532f5417407bdba497ad3: Not sure if I would call them our friends... Not enemies either, of course.
textByHash.936ffabab2ec6c1fd474b9a6fce3bcd587677ca8: Why, hello, yes, what is it?
textByHash.97a381bee9ddc82c871308e30bf7bb1832b8c2b2: And I'm Miodvetnir. These are my brothers. And who might you be?
textByHash.6d87f551b80b7fbd41d46bdb5431e69a255861f1: It's a human, you metal head! You should pay more attention!
textByHash.ca1c2f572cd5d2d10e4250879faa5f2c9a4fab03: Of course, we love answering questions!
textByHash.9613423f02fc020cfb0e51300db25e90357930fd: Only fair if he wants to go into the city.
textByHash.e355a72e60097d876c9e324e76e665ebe3ae9bf6: Only fair if she wants to go into the city.
textByHash.3cb42c8b204e234df18af2123a5ebad7d6de39c4: So watch out if you ever do manage to travel to the city! Weird things could happen!
textByHash.68395daf959d3e4ff364694ed0b3b659aa270635: Say, you're the Fishing Champion, aren't you?
textByHash.bb595a152448f1d1a9b8755e012bb26c1c36de76: But they're not all small! Some can be large!
textByHash.8e2850f4f844a75f9ab79c610db952bbac36e509: But could tell you all about it! After all, he's the Fishing Champion!
textByHash.7d9239b949881f6dc3b5ea4d1e11e98f58b22e72: But could tell you all about it! After all, she's the Fishing Champion!
textByHash.4e6699e33cd2e33148e734464071ce1162e23a03: What does it look like they're used for?
textByHash.95b43988fe917890d3336ec9ed34892da7cbe406: These mines are actually the territory of one of the eight major companies of the mining Consortium.
textByHash.88f5ac79c256a9bdd5a03740d9b589d4c0347fa3: We haul all our goods to the city by ship, you see.
textByHash.1795cf970e784246f570d3581cfa2f66c717caee: Oh, you're not going to get through there I'm afraid.
textByHash.7165a2d085e846bbc0b55a6de506c28747147ee1: Eighteen years, Derni, and not a year shorter!
textByHash.984f15c82468b9b21dd346b3b49c8cc1050a802c: Well... have you tried a rune pickaxe?
textByHash.bf91b843a2a5a618aafe651602c27dd45731b7b0: He was always obsessed with that rock.
textByHash.3677f05865f5f55f10ef18e89281695996f453d9: I once met a good demon though.
textByHash.4c7a78a094cb3d6b4a9780bf9fb2f637db401c2a: He gave me a puzzle box and then went off again.
textByHash.486be1c38e4f5cd532baa299e9cbe6e93318f5ae: Could be, could be, but there's no telling, is there?
textByHash.b3cbbf9a33bb40e6d0f17035321a5e8d20b8cc10: That's quite impressive, Player. How did you manage to do that?
textByHash.30ef8b6a6764a772ea4223ac28bc01ee8f5a80d3: No, you're more a ranger, aren't you Player?
textByHash.a39b8582fd5f7f2d5c60661aa3ccf0908ace022d: Tonight, of course, not now. We're on duty now.
textByHash.10add30872ee9a49f30755278901ea83a3218442: I heard there's vast amount of gold inside!
textByHash.b01a47c70d680374e0b8eeb7399f1b84e9d6c60b: Right. Let's get back to work.
textByHash.17e8e5fea6c3a18629aefc568c7137430e9f732d: A terrible noise it made too!
textByHash.6154c806815c51496ea3fd7e91dce38eb7b8fb12: You have told that story before, Dernu.
textByHash.be895dab45d5af417c8a13ac07c92b9f49a6aa3e: What do you need us for then?
textByHash.4127632b254ead43fd2da8754d4fae4a8b35db00: Now now, Derni, there was no need for that.
textByHash.415771b5ed6d3b0fbe2882c06458bbb68501fcf9: And didn't you see Blasidar working on the statue?
textByHash.e2e25075197f77acf60d06e8303becc2efef46dd: He truly is a master builder.
textByHash.01c0d38519ddaaa0d362f4ab78ed258fa85f7c12: Quite right. Anything else you wanted, Player?
textByHash.3bb4e5208698b2c836662758ba8e1b0102b87ec1: Now now, there's no reason to get angry.
textByHash.0f2309c2f5089223a49da0b5d1944fa84eaf4877: Has some pretty odd tales to tell too.
textByHash.d0417e9b47a6bd88ad7c7f83f71453edf591b065: I think we've heard it before.
